/soft/compilers/gcc/13.3.0/x86_64-suse-linux/bin/g++ -g -DKOKKOS_DEPENDENCE CMakeFiles/ddilog_driver.dir/driver/ddilog_driver.cc.o -o ddilog_driver  /home/rbarik/Agentic-Mixed-Precision-Demo/kokkos/install/kokkos-4.7.01/Release/lib64/libkokkoscontainers.a /home/rbarik/Agentic-Mixed-Precision-Demo/kokkos/install/kokkos-4.7.01/Release/lib64/libkokkosalgorithms.a /home/rbarik/Agentic-Mixed-Precision-Demo/kokkos/install/kokkos-4.7.01/Release/lib64/libkokkoscore.a -ldl /home/rbarik/Agentic-Mixed-Precision-Demo/kokkos/install/kokkos-4.7.01/Release/lib64/libkokkossimd.a
